title: The receipt lies
checkLabels.t12: The name comes out in capitals
why.untouched: script.js is exactly as it was.
hint2.untouched: Five lines, five broken things. The first is already on the cups line — the console shows NaN.
why.not-closed: A tag in index.html is open and never closed.
why.not-linked: The script never reaches the page.
why.crashed: Your code stopped with an error.
hint2.crashed: Look at the Console panel below. Fix one thing, submit, look at the next.
why.erased-source: You changed what the person typed.
hint2.erased-source: That is what is in the field. The code has to cope with it.
why.reversed-signs: The plus and equals signs are reversed somewhere.
hint2.reversed-signs: Reversed, they do not accumulate, they replace.
why.no-trim: You are not removing the spaces at the ends anywhere.
hint2.no-trim: Both the name and the tip arrive with spaces around them.
why.still-glued: You are still joining text with plus.
hint2.wrong-cups: It says 4 cups. Number wants the whole text to be a number.
hint3.wrong-cups: If NaN comes out here, every following sum becomes NaN too. The mistake spreads downwards.
hint2.wrong-total: Four cups at three is twelve, plus two for service. Three things along the way spoil it.
hint3.wrong-total: One is the reversed signs. Another is the division, which happens before the addition. The third is the rounding, which is missing.
why.wrong-tip: The missing tip is not spotted.
hint2.wrong-tip: The field contains only spaces. Remove them and see whether anything is left.
hint3.wrong-tip: Number of empty text gives 0, not NaN. That is why the check here is on the text itself, not the number.
why.not-called: The name does not come out in capitals.
hint2.not-called: The brackets are missing. And the spaces at the front and back have to go too.
why.wrong-line: The line does not come out right.
why.wrong-count: There are not five lines in the console.
why.lost-p: A paragraph has disappeared from the page.
blocks.0.text: A receipt for a customer. Cups, total, tip, name, a line to print.
blocks.1.text: The code runs from start to finish. Nothing breaks. And all five lines in the console are wrong.
blocks.2.text: What it is supposed to do
blocks.3.text: The customer typed 4 cups with spaces. The price is 3 lev, the service charge 2.
blocks.4.items.1: the total is 14 — four times three plus two
blocks.4.items.2: the tip is missing and that is recognised
blocks.4.items.3: the name comes out as 4 CUPS, with no spaces
blocks.6.text: The first mistake is already on the cups line. Fix that one first — almost every other number depends on it.
blocks.7.text: Then submit and see what comes out. The heaviest failure is shown, not all of them at once.
blocks.8.text: Code that does not break is not the same as code that works.
blocks.10.text: Fix everything. Do not touch what the customer typed, or the prices.
blocks.11.text: Each of the five broken things comes from a lesson in this section. If you cannot place one, the hint ladder is under every failed check.
